scripts.build: node ./scripts/run-local-bin.mjs typescript -b --force && pnpm --filter @openclaw-enhanced/bamdra-memory-context-engine run bundle && pnpm --filter @openclaw-enhanced/bamdra-memory-tools run bundle && pnpm --filter @bamdra/bamdra-openclaw-memory run bundle && node ./scripts/copy-assets.mjs
scripts.clean: find . -name dist -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && find . -name tsconfig.tsbuildinfo -delete
scripts.test: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && node --test tests/**/*.test.mjs
